title: Born_in_Chaos_X_epic_fight
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the Born in Chaos weapons
body:
I animated some of the weapons in the Ice and Fire mod for the Epic fight mod

- Note!!! Required Items:

1. Born in Chaos:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
2. epic fight:https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight
